hero.title: go-i2p
hero.subtitle: ʻO I2P no Go — mea alakaʻi, waihona puke SAM, awa, kālaihana a me nā mea hana.
callout.desc: ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻohana i ka mea alakaʻi go-i2p. No ka hana, e hoʻohana i i2pd (C++) a i ʻole Java I2P.
callout.libs: ʻO nā waihona puke hoʻohui (onramp, goSam, sam3) he paʻa a hana me kekahi mea alakaʻi I2P.
cat.tunnel.note: alakaʻi a me nā mea hoʻololi
cat.networking.note: kaula i nā kālaihana ʻē aʻe
cat.git.note: holo i nā lawelawe Git ma I2P
desc.onramp: API kiʻekiʻe. Papa kuhikuhi i ʻōlelo ʻia.
desc.goSam: Proxy HTTP i ~50 laina. Maʻalahi, hiki ke hoʻonohonoho.
desc.sam3: SAMv3.3 piha. Nā koho āpau, nā kikoʻī āpau.
desc.go-i2p: Mea alakaʻi I2P Go maʻemaʻe. 97★. ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻohana.
desc.common: Waihona puke kaʻana ʻia mai ka mea alakaʻi.
desc.i2pkeys: Mālama ki I2P. Hoʻohana ʻia e onramp/goSam/sam3.
desc.su3: Waihona puke SU3 me ka nānā inoa.
desc.go-i2ptunnel: I2PTunnel no Go. Hoʻololi i sam-forwarder.
desc.go-meta-dialer: Mea kelepona no clearnet, onion a me I2P.
desc.go-connfilter: Huna hoʻohui ma ka pae net.Listener.
desc.go-forward: API maʻemaʻe no ka hoʻouna/hoʻololi pūnaewele.
desc.go-docker-network-i2p: Mea hoʻokele pūnaewele Docker me I2P.
desc.go-i2p-teaui: TUI I2PControl hana ʻia me BubbleTea.
desc.go-i2p-bt: BitTorrent no I2P. Like me I2PSnark.
desc.railroad: Mīkini blog me nā kiʻi Ghost.
desc.i2p-stats: Heluhelu a me ka hoʻohui helu mea alakaʻi.
desc.gitlab-to-gitea: Hoʻololi waihona mai GitLab i Gitea.
desc.logger: Nā mea hana palapala no go-i2p.
desc.util: Nā hana kōkua ʻaʻole kūpono i wahi ʻē aʻe.
desc.checki2cp: E nānā i ka I2CP. CLI + waihona puke.
maturity.onramp: mature, implements SAMv3.3, Streaming and Datagrams
maturity.go-sam-go: mature, implements SAMv3.3, Streaming and Datagrams
maturity.go-i2pcontrol: mature but does not provide all possible consts (like ratestats)
section.interface_note: Connection libraries act as drop-in replacements for net.Conn and net.PacketConn in your Go code. When used correctly, they make it easy to adapt Go applications to I2P.
section.quickstart.note: Requires a running I2P router (i2pd or Java I2P). See onramp for full docs.
status.ready.title: ✅ Mature Libraries
status.ready.desc: Connection libraries (onramp, goSam, sam3) are stable and work with any I2P router. The Streaming and Datagram APIs are reliable.
status.dev.title: 🔧 In Development
status.dev.desc: The core router (go-i2p) is operational but not production-safe. I2CP, Streaming, and Datagram client libraries are functional but APIs may change between 0.1.x and 0.2.0.
status.advice.title: 📋 For Developers
status.advice.desc: The API below onramp is unstable. Use high-level libraries to minimize churn. See the router README for detailed status.
